full_text:
Tissue was minced in small pieces and dissociated with: 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/step) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer, RBC lysis with 4 ml for 5 min + 16 ml DMEM/F12+++. Final pellet was resuspended in 5 ml of media and counted

Cell counts:

Cell count/ml 1):

total: 7.69 E6 cells/mL

live: 6.12 E6 cells/mL

viability: 80.3 %

size: 8.5 um

Cell count /ml 2):

total: 7.93 E6 cells/mL

live: 6.36 E6 cells/mL

viability: 80.1 %

size: 8.6 um

Average cell count/ml: 7.81 E6 cells/ml Total cell count: 7.81 E6 cells/mL x 5mL = 39.05 E6 cells

Total volume: 5 mL

Long-term organoid establishment

2 vials of 1E6 (live) cells were given to Joonas/Anna for long-term organoids establishment.

Freezing

4 vials of 5E6 cells each were frozen. Cells were resuspended in 1 mL of STEMCELL Banker in each tube.
